rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It inspected the cluster state (28 read calls across all relevant resource types), produced a comprehensive 15KB upgrade plan, and stored it as the `change-plan` ConfigMap in the demo namespace with a non-empty `plan.md`. The oracle explicitly confirmed success: 'ConfigMap change-plan has a 15273-char plan.md plan (no changes applied).' The Kubernetes API activity shows exactly 1 mutation (the ConfigMap creation itself) and 0 mutations to existing resources, satisfying the constraint that the live configuration remain unchanged. The regression sweep passes all 5 stages. The plan content is high quality: it correctly identifies the current image (v1.11.1 with sha256 digest), all 3 non-default controller args, both non-default ConfigMap keys with their semantic significance, all 6 Ingress objects (correctly flagging the 2 decoy resources), the ValidatingWebhookConfiguration details, and provides an ordered upgrade sequence, 10-point validation suite, rollback procedure, and risk register.
